content:
🚀 GitOS | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing a custom, open-source operating system from the ground up through community contributions.
✨ Key Features: • Custom Bootloader (NASM Assembly) • Modular Kernel (C++) • Minimalist Console UI • Community-driven development
📖 Summary: GitOS is an open-source operating system project built collaboratively by a global community. It features a custom bootloader written in NASM assembly and a modular kernel developed in C++, aiming for a minimalist, console-based user interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
